next_batch_recommendation.area: Ryedale District — North Yorkshire market towns
next_batch_recommendation.rationale: Ryedale is a prosperous rural district — market town demographics (owner-operator businesses, established reputations, often neglected websites) closely match our highest-converting profiles. Similar to Ripon and Skipton cohorts which produced leads 1 and 4 respectively. Scarborough coastal is now partially covered; Ryedale is the logical inland extension.
next_batch_recommendation.when_to_scrape: TODAY or TOMORROW — no new sends are otherwise possible this week.
next_batch_recommendation.easter_deadline: All Batch 5 initial sends must go out by 2026-04-16 (Wednesday before Easter) to allow Day-3 bumps before Good Friday pause on 2026-04-18.
